tools.name: ssh-capabilities
tools.title: SSH Capabilities
tools.description: Inspect POSIX remote session support, tmux availability, package managers, and basic shell tools.

host.description: SSH host - alias from ~/.ssh/config or hostname/IP

remotePlatform.description: Remote path platform. Use "windows" for paths like C:\\repo\\file.txt. Default: auto

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH handshake timeout in ms (default: 20000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms (default: 30000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

execTimeoutMs.description: Per-command execution timeout in ms (default: 120000). Used by remote-ssh and hash-verified file tools.

tools.name: ssh-session-open
tools.title: SSH Session Open
tools.description: Open a trusted persistent remote tmux session. Preserves cwd and environment across ssh-session-exec calls.

host.description: SSH host - alias from ~/.ssh/config or hostname/IP

remotePlatform.description: Remote path platform. Use "windows" for paths like C:\\repo\\file.txt. Default: auto

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH handshake timeout in ms (default: 20000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms (default: 30000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

execTimeoutMs.description: Per-command execution timeout in ms (default: 120000). Used by remote-ssh and hash-verified file tools.

tools.name: ssh-session-exec
tools.title: SSH Session Exec
tools.description: Run a command inside a persistent tmux session. Returns metadata first; read output with ssh-session-read.

host.description: SSH host - alias from ~/.ssh/config or hostname/IP

remotePlatform.description: Remote path platform. Use "windows" for paths like C:\\repo\\file.txt. Default: auto

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH handshake timeout in ms (default: 20000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms (default: 30000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

execTimeoutMs.description: Per-command execution timeout in ms (default: 120000). Used by remote-ssh and hash-verified file tools.

command.description: Shell command to execute in the persistent session

waitSeconds.description: Seconds to wait for command completion. Default: 300

tools.name: ssh-session-read
tools.title: SSH Session Read
tools.description: Read a paginated stdout/stderr window from a persistent session command.

host.description: SSH host - alias from ~/.ssh/config or hostname/IP

remotePlatform.description: Remote path platform. Use "windows" for paths like C:\\repo\\file.txt. Default: auto

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH handshake timeout in ms (default: 20000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms (default: 30000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

execTimeoutMs.description: Per-command execution timeout in ms (default: 120000). Used by remote-ssh and hash-verified file tools.

stream.description: Output stream: stdout or stderr. Default: stdout

raw.description: When true, return only the output content field

tools.name: ssh-session-close
tools.title: SSH Session Close
tools.description: Close a trusted persistent tmux session and remove its remote session directory.

host.description: SSH host - alias from ~/.ssh/config or hostname/IP

remotePlatform.description: Remote path platform. Use "windows" for paths like C:\\repo\\file.txt. Default: auto

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH handshake timeout in ms (default: 20000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms (default: 30000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

execTimeoutMs.description: Per-command execution timeout in ms (default: 120000). Used by remote-ssh and hash-verified file tools.

tools.name: ssh-session-gc
tools.title: SSH Session GC
tools.description: Remove expired trusted hex-ssh tmux sessions. Only sessions with valid hex-ssh metadata are touched.

host.description: SSH host - alias from ~/.ssh/config or hostname/IP

remotePlatform.description: Remote path platform. Use "windows" for paths like C:\\repo\\file.txt. Default: auto

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH handshake timeout in ms (default: 20000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms (default: 30000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

execTimeoutMs.description: Per-command execution timeout in ms (default: 120000). Used by remote-ssh and hash-verified file tools.

olderThanSeconds.description: Delete trusted sessions older than this many seconds. Default: delete expired sessions only

tools.name: remote-ssh
tools.title: SSH Command
tools.description: Execute shell commands on remote servers. Disabled by default. Set REMOTE_SSH_MODE=safe or REMOTE_SSH_MODE=open to enable.

host.description: SSH host - alias from ~/.ssh/config or hostname/IP

remotePlatform.description: Remote path platform. Use "windows" for paths like C:\\repo\\file.txt. Default: auto

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH handshake timeout in ms (default: 20000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms (default: 30000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

execTimeoutMs.description: Per-command execution timeout in ms (default: 120000). Used by remote-ssh and hash-verified file tools.

tools.name: ssh-read-lines
tools.title: SSH Read File
tools.description: Read remote file with hash-annotated lines. Use startLine/maxLines for large files. Returns range checksums for edit verification.

host.description: SSH host - alias from ~/.ssh/config or hostname/IP

remotePlatform.description: Remote path platform. Use "windows" for paths like C:\\repo\\file.txt. Default: auto

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH handshake timeout in ms (default: 20000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms (default: 30000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

execTimeoutMs.description: Per-command execution timeout in ms (default: 120000). Used by remote-ssh and hash-verified file tools.

filePath.description: Path to file on remote server

endLine.description: End line (optional, reads to limit if not set)

tools.name: ssh-edit-block
tools.title: SSH Edit File
tools.description: Edit remote files using hash-verified anchors. Use ssh-read-lines first to get hash anchors and checksums.

host.description: SSH host - alias from ~/.ssh/config or hostname/IP

remotePlatform.description: Remote path platform. Use "windows" for paths like C:\\repo\\file.txt. Default: auto

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH handshake timeout in ms (default: 20000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms (default: 30000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

execTimeoutMs.description: Per-command execution timeout in ms (default: 120000). Used by remote-ssh and hash-verified file tools.

filePath.description: Path to file on remote server

checksum.description: Range checksum from ssh-read-lines (e.g. '1-50:f7e2a1b0'). If provided, verifies file unchanged before edit.

anchor.description: Hash anchor 'ab.42' to set single line (from ssh-read-lines)

startAnchor.description: Start hash anchor 'ab.42' for range replace

endAnchor.description: End hash anchor 'cd.45' for range replace

tools.name: ssh-search-code
tools.title: SSH Search
tools.description: Search remote files with grep. Returns hash-annotated matches with deduplication. Use for finding code before ssh-edit-block.

host.description: SSH host - alias from ~/.ssh/config or hostname/IP

remotePlatform.description: Remote path platform. Use "windows" for paths like C:\\repo\\file.txt. Default: auto

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH handshake timeout in ms (default: 20000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms (default: 30000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

execTimeoutMs.description: Per-command execution timeout in ms (default: 120000). Used by remote-ssh and hash-verified file tools.

path.description: Directory to search on remote server

tools.name: ssh-write-chunk
tools.title: SSH Write File
tools.description: Write or append to remote files. Rewrite mode is atomic (temp file + rename). Append mode is non-atomic (direct >>). Auto-creates parent directories.

host.description: SSH host - alias from ~/.ssh/config or hostname/IP

remotePlatform.description: Remote path platform. Use "windows" for paths like C:\\repo\\file.txt. Default: auto

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH handshake timeout in ms (default: 20000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms (default: 30000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

execTimeoutMs.description: Per-command execution timeout in ms (default: 120000). Used by remote-ssh and hash-verified file tools.

filePath.description: Path to file on remote server

tools.name: ssh-upload
tools.title: SSH Upload File
tools.description: Upload a local file to a remote server over SFTP. Supports text and binary files, rejects existing destinations by default, validates path boundaries, and stages via the strongest available remote finalize path.

host.description: SSH host - alias from ~/.ssh/config or hostname/IP

remotePlatform.description: Remote path platform. Use "windows" for paths like C:\\repo\\file.txt. Default: auto

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH handshake timeout in ms (default: 20000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms (default: 30000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

transferTimeoutMs.description: SFTP inactivity timeout in ms (default: 120000; env TRANSFER_TIMEOUT_MS overrides default). Used by ssh-upload/ssh-download.

localPath.description: Absolute local file path or ~/path to upload

remotePath.description: Absolute destination path on remote server

overwrite.description: Replace existing destination when true. Default: false

permissions.description: Optional octal file mode for uploaded file, e.g. 0644

tools.name: ssh-download
tools.title: SSH Download File
tools.description: Download a remote file to the local machine over SFTP. Supports text and binary files, rejects existing destinations by default, validates path boundaries, and stages to a verified local finalize path.

host.description: SSH host - alias from ~/.ssh/config or hostname/IP

remotePlatform.description: Remote path platform. Use "windows" for paths like C:\\repo\\file.txt. Default: auto

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH handshake timeout in ms (default: 20000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms (default: 30000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

transferTimeoutMs.description: SFTP inactivity timeout in ms (default: 120000; env TRANSFER_TIMEOUT_MS overrides default). Used by ssh-upload/ssh-download.

remotePath.description: Absolute file path on remote server

overwrite.description: Replace existing destination when true. Default: false

tools.name: ssh-verify
tools.title: SSH Verify Checksums
tools.description: Check if range checksums still match remote file. Single-line response avoids full re-read. Use before editing after a pause.

host.description: SSH host - alias from ~/.ssh/config or hostname/IP

remotePlatform.description: Remote path platform. Use "windows" for paths like C:\\repo\\file.txt. Default: auto

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH handshake timeout in ms (default: 20000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms (default: 30000). Per-call override. Different values spawn separate pooled connections.

execTimeoutMs.description: Per-command execution timeout in ms (default: 120000). Used by remote-ssh and hash-verified file tools.

filePath.description: Path to file on remote server

checksums.description: JSON array of checksum strings, e.g. ["1-50:f7e2a1b0", "51-100:abcd1234"]
